hero.headline: Backend Developer Building Scalable Systems
hero.subheadline: I design and implement robust server-side solutions that power modern web applications. With expertise in Node.js, Python, and distributed systems, I help teams build reliable and scalable backend infrastructures.

sections.heading: About Me
sections.content: I'm Aymen, a backend developer passionate about creating efficient, scalable server-side applications. With a strong foundation in computer science and hands-on experience in building RESTful APIs, microservices, and database architectures, I specialize in turning complex requirements into reliable technical solutions. My expertise spans across Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and cloud platforms like AWS. When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects or exploring the latest advancements in distributed systems.
sections.image_prompt: Professional headshot of a Middle Eastern male developer in his 30s, wearing business casual attire, sitting in a modern office environment with a laptop, looking confident and approachable, natural lighting

sections.heading: Technical Skills
sections.content: My technical toolkit includes a comprehensive set of backend technologies and frameworks. I specialize in server-side development with Node.js and Python, leveraging frameworks like Express.js and FastAPI. My database expertise covers both SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) solutions. I'm experienced with containerization using Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes, and cloud services on AWS. Additionally, I implement robust API designs, integrate message queues like RabbitMQ, and ensure application security through authentication protocols and data encryption practices.

sections.heading: Get In Touch
sections.content: Interested in having me contribute to your team's backend infrastructure? Whether you're working on a high-traffic web application, designing microservices architecture, or need assistance with database optimization, I'd love to discuss how my experience can benefit your project. Feel free to reach out via email or connect with me on LinkedIn to explore potential opportunities.
sections.image_prompt: Abstract digital background with circuit board patterns, flowing data streams, and interconnected nodes in blue and purple hues, representing backend infrastructure and data flow

features.title: E-Commerce Platform API
features.description: Developed a high-performance RESTful API serving a multi-vendor e-commerce platform handling 10,000+ daily transactions. Implemented JWT authentication, payment gateway integration with Stripe, and real-time inventory management using WebSocket connections. Built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, deployed on AWS with auto-scaling capabilities.

features.title: Data Analytics Pipeline
features.description: Engineered a data processing pipeline that aggregates and analyzes user behavior data from multiple sources. The system processes 500GB+ of data daily using Python with Apache Kafka for stream processing and stores results in PostgreSQL for reporting dashboards. Reduced data processing time by 60% compared to the previous solution.

features.title: Microservices Architecture
features.description: Designed and implemented a microservices-based booking system for a hospitality startup. Services include user management, reservation processing, and notification systems, communicating through RabbitMQ message queues. Built with Python FastAPI and containerized with Docker, achieving 99.9% uptime and handling peak loads of 5,000 requests per minute.
